column4: This item will completely obsure the User's face to a point where nobody can remember what the User looks like. Nobody will notice the User was wearing an item to obfuscate their face unless the magical item or its effect was detected.
column64: The Character is able to purchase vehicles at 1/3rd of the listed price. These can be traded in and swapped without refund. All repairs and starting ammo are free. The vehicle counts as part of the Soldier Type's Equipment Pack.

column4: While worn, the User is able to levitate themselves at their normal Movement speeds indefinetely, even while asleep. The user cannot move higher than a Meter off of the ground.If the User is not currently levitating, this item can be used to levitate objects up to 10 Meters away, as long as the object is less than 10 kg.
column64: The Character is able to purchase weapons at 1/3rd of the list price. These weapons can only be resold at half of the price that was paid.

column4: As a Full Action, the User can focus on a Character within 20 Meters and set them on fire, dealing Flame (2D10). This magic has a Recharge of 2 Turns before it can be used again.
column64: If an Insurrectionist was chosen, then any weapon without the [I] Tag will cost 25% more. Insurrectionists gain all Weapon and Vehicle Modifications at Half cR Price.

column4: While worn, the User takes no Penalties in Darkness and Lowlight and can see normally. This includes the effects of darkening and light-removing Spells and other Attacks that remove light or the User's ability to use using darkness.
column64: The Soldier Type gains an extra Support Point at Character Creation after each mission. This Support Point does not regenerate after use.

column4: While worn, the User takes no Penalties from Brightness and Blinding lights and can see normally. This includes the effects of flashbangs and other Spells and Attacks that would temporarily blind the User.
column64: The Character begins at Rank of O-1 (or equivelant in terms of Medieval or other rank-types) and can choose Limited Packs even if another Character already has it.

column4: The User can see in every direction around them, meaning that the User cannot be caught by Surprise Attacks unless by Invisible Characters or extreme long distances, well beyond the User's Perceptive Range.
column64: Able to call in their Faction's Infantry Support at half cost.
Gains a +10 Bonus to Toughness Tests when resisting Spores, Flood Spores, Infection Forms, and Seeder Forms.

column4: For 10 Turns, the User's Size Category is increased by 2. The User will also gain +6 Mythic Strength, +5 Mythic Toughness, and +4 Mythic Agility. All Melee Attacks gain an extra +6 Damage on top of the Size Category bonus.
For 6 Turns, the User gains +30 to Strength, Toughness, and Agility. The Character also gains a +20 to Warfare Melee and Warfare Range, and a +50 to Courage.
column64: The Character is considered to have training in all types of Weapons.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 10 minutes of water breathing.
column64: The Character begins with the Fast Foot Ability.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 10 minutes of walking on water.
column64: When protecting Civilians, +20 Bonus to Courage.

column4: For 10 Turns, the User's Size Category is reduced by 3, to a minimum of Mini. While active, this gives the User +10 to their Agility.
column64: All Languages are at half price to learn.

column4: Has 2 uses. Each use will remove Diseases, Poisons, and even radiation poisoning.
column64: The Character gains a -20 Penalty to Swimming and Climbing Tests.

column4: Allows the User to run up to 6 hours straight without taking fatigue.
column64: The Character is able to pay Experience to further improve their Mythic Characteristics.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the user 20 Turns of Invisibility, giving the User a +60 to Camouflage Tests.
Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 10 minutes of doubling the Character's Jump height and Leap distance.
column64: An Opposed Test where the User makes a Perception Test against the Opponent's Courage. If Successful, the Opponent is Mind Controlled 1 Round for each Degree of Success higher the User has over the Opponent.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 10 minutes of flight, allowing the User to fly at double their Movement Speeds.
column64: The Character gains a +20 Bonus to Leadership when dealing with their Faction.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 10 minutes of Featherfalling. The User cannot take Falling Damage. While Character is in the air, they can only fall 5 Meters per Half Action. Character's cannot use Evasion while Featherfalling
column64: The Character is not used to standard gravity, giving them a -10 Penalty for Tests unless using a given item to counteract these effects.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 30 minutes of Falling Damage being reduced by half and removing the ability for Special Damage to be caused by Falling Damage.
column64: At Character Creation, or when the Character becomes Combat Trained, gain 5 Support Points once. These do regenerate.

column4: For 10 Turns, the User's Damage Resistance is increased by 15.
For 10 Turns, the User gains +30 to Resist Spells and halves all Damage caused from Spells after Damage Resistance.
For 10 Turns, the User gains +30 to Agility, +2 Mythic Agility, and an extra +20 to Evasion.
column64: The Character is formed of roughly 300 singular entities. The Character is immune to the Headshot Special Rule and Special Damage. The Character takes 3 months before suffering from Hunger and Thirst. The Character can survive in a vacuum.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User +1 Mythic Strength for 10 Turns.
column64: The Character can see active technology through radio waves and magnetic fields. Able to see the tech up to half their Perspective Range in Meters. Can see tech through walls up to their Perception Modifier in Meters if using a Full Action to concentrate. Cannot tell what the technology is using this Trait. Cant see items as small as a cell phone.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User the ability to see in Darkness and Lowlight without Penalty for 10 minutes.
column64: The Character has large claws that lack the precision for delicate actions. Gain -20 Penalty when throwing items, grabbing small items, attempting to catch items, etc.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User the ability to see in Brightness and Blinding lights without Penalty for 10 minutes.
column64: The Character can pilot and hijack vehicles using their body by either collapsing or attaching themselves to it. Gestalt characters must allow the majority of their entities to board the vehicle. This bypasses the hijacking rules. The pilot of the vehicle must use an Opposed Agility Test to fight for control of the vehicle at the beginning of each Round.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 10 minutes of a +20 Bonus to Climbing Actions. The User can also climb on surfaces they normally could not.
column64: The Character doubles their Intellect Modifier when figuring how many Educations they may learn.

column4: For 20 Turns, all Characters will see the User as if they were a tree, regardless of the Actions being taken.
column64: The Character is able to take an infinite amount of Educations

column4: Has 3 uses. Ecah use will give the User 10 minutes of being able to talk so loud that people from up to 2 Kilometers away can hear them. Very frowned upon in towns and cities.
column64: The Character is passive by nature. When wanting to make Attack Actions, the Character must pass a Courage Test. If failed, the Character is unable to go through with Attacking for that Round.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User the ability to understand and speak all languages.
column64: The Character is able to sense any form of technology when its within its Perceptive Range. This Trait does not allow the Character to know what the technology is.

column4: Allows the User to teleport up to 20 Meters away 3 times within 10 minutes from use.
column64: The Character can see through 20 Meters of Wall, floor, and non-biological obstacles, to find biological forms. Gives +30 Bonus to finding Characters using Camouflage, Cloaking, and Active Camouflage. Lasts for 4 Half Actions and recharges for 6 Half Actions.

column4: Has 2 uses. Heals the User 3D10 Wounds and removes 2D5 Fatigue.
column64: The Character is able to spawn a Promethean Watcher with a Full Action. These Watchers, if destroyed, take 20 in-game minutes to rebuild and redeploy. The Character does not control the Watcher, the Watcher will act on its own. It will attempt to stick alongside the Character and stay 5 Meters above if possible. Watcher priorities are projecting shields, catching grenades, and redeploying the Character if killed.

column4: Has 2 uses. Heals the User 4D10+6 Wounds and removes 3D5+3 Fatigue.
column64: The Character has an extra set of small arms, the size of a human child's. These can be used to bypass the Claws/Unyieldy Claws Trait.Cannot be used to throw weapons and do not gain the benefits of Mythic Strength.

column4: Has 2 uses. Heals the User 4D10+8 Wounds and removes 4D5+4 Fatigue.
column64: The Character is able to catch thrown objects in a stasis field. The object must be within 5 Meters of the Character. The Character can then throw the object up to 25 Meters away, but every 1 kg of the object reduces the distance by 2 Meters.

column4: Has 2 uses. Heals the User 5D10+10 Wounds and removes 5D5+5 Fatigue.
column64: The Character is able to respawn dead Characters (Prometheans) as an extended 2 Full Actions. The Watcher must be within 25 Meters of the dying Promethean to be able to respawn them. The Promethean comes back with half its full Wounds. Wounds halve with each time the Promethean redeploys.

column4: For 5 Turns, the User doubles their Movement Speeds and gains a 3rd Half Action per Turn that can be used for any Action except for using Firearms.
column64: The Character gains a +20 Bonus to Camouflage and any stealth-based Characteristic and Skill Tests.

column4: For 10 Turns, the User is immune to non-magic Fire.
column64: The Character cannot break bones unless an absurd amount of force is used, such as a Scarab vehicle stepping onto the Character's Leg.

column4: Has 3 uses. Each use will give the User 10 minutes of immunity to Radiation and Radiation Poisoning.
column64: The Character halves all Penalties to Darkness and Brightness penalties.
The Character's first Evasion taken in a Round does not give a Penalty to the following Evasion Action.

Targeted on a corpse, Psi-Reanimate will bring back one dead character to be Mind Controlled to follow the orders of the User. If the User dies, the corpse dies again. The Corpse can only take 1 Half Action each Round and goes during the User's Initiative.
A random chance of one of the following on a roll of a 1D5. Psi-Panic (1-2), Psi-Disorientation (3-4), or Psi-Mind Control (5).
The Spartan IV gains +5 to physical Characteristics when wearing GEN II and GEN III Mjolnir.
The Character is able to disguise themselves as another that they've studied for at least one minute. Cannot copy memories, magic, abilities, traits, etc.
A Psionic Attack that rolls on the Fear Chart and deals 1D10 Damage ignoring Damage Resistence. The Character is healed for the Damage dealt.

The Soldier Type is not alive and is unaffected by any Social Skills or mind-altering Spells, Traits, or Abilities. Characters with the Non-Sentient Trait will do what they're designed to do and cannot deviate. They do not need to eat, breathe, or sleep.
The Character becomes immune to Attacks and Effects that give them Penalties.
The Character is able to interface with electronics as if it were a computer. Takes no difficulty penalties with technology-based Tests and gains a +10.

The Character is able to connect with organic material. Always counts as having medical tools. Takes no penalties for Medical Tests and gains a +10. Each Degree of Success on a Medical Test made when attempting to heal will always heal 1 extra Wound and reduce 1 extra Level of Fatigue.

The Character can project an Energy Shield to allies equaling their Perception Modifier. Works up to 8 Meters away from the Character. Takes a Half Action to use and a Half Action to change who gets the Overshield. Shield Integrity of 50, Delay of 3, Recharge Rate of 10.
The Character makes a powerful Area of Effect Attack opening a Rift, damaging all Characters within. When the Rift closes, it deals this damage a second time.

When Commanding Characters sharing the same Faction, automatically succeed at any Social Tests with a minimum of 1 Degree of Success. The GM only needs to roll against this Character if thsoe in their faction are actively fighting against them.

When the Character is reduced to 0 or less Wounds, a Slipspace (or Void) Field will open up in a 3 Meter radius. This field teleports the Character and any equipment or segments within the Field to safety. For the Slipspace Field, it will teleport any Promethean equipment within its Field, including Prefect Mjolnir Armor and its wearer. This includes Characters using or wearing Forerunner-based Armor Abilities, Weapons, and Permutations.

The Constraint Field allows the Character to constrain and levitate Characters and Objects. The Constraint Field can carry up to 600kg. Characters in the Constraint Field are Helpless and can only take Speech ACtions. After use, it takes 10 Full Actions to recharge.

The Character is able to repair Break Points of any piece of Equipment or Vehicle. The Character can repair 1 Break Point per Turn. Mechanical Characters will be healed 1 Wound per Turn, instead of Breakpoints.
The Chosen get a series of Strengths, Weaknesses, and Utilities.

An Opposed Test where the User makes a Perception Test against the Opponent's Courage. If Successful, the Opponent is considered Pinned for 4 Rounds, reduced by 1 for every 3 Courage Modifier of the Opponent.

An Opposed Test where the User makes a Perception Test against the Opponent's Courage. If Successful, the Opponent is Disorientated for 2 Rounds. When Disorientated, the Opponent gains a -20 Penalty To Hit and a -20 Penalty to Courage.
The Character is naturally blind.
The Character can dig quickly enough to allow them to move as a Half Action while digging underground.

Characters who have succumb to the Lambency will explode when they die. This explosion deals Acid (1D10) to everyone within a Blast (X) Radius, where (X) is the Character's Melee Reach +1. The Character's blood is also acidic, dealing Acid (3) to any Character that comes into contact that Turn. Lambent Characters do not feel pain and will not go unconcious at 0 Wounds, and must be outright killed.
column65: In two Rounds, the Infection Form will have infected, taken over, and transformed the Character, creating either a Carrier Form or a Combat Form.

column64: The Character can only make Bite Attacks.
column65: If the Character burns a point of Luck, the Infection Form is destroyed and the Character is back to 1 Wound.

column64: The Characters attack in swarms of (X), where (X) is decided by the GM. Swarms attack as one, increasing Mythic Strength by (X) for the Attack.
The Character detonates themselves as a biological explosive.

When a Flood Infection Form dies within half a Meter of the face of a Character, the Character must make a +30 Toughness Test. If failed, the Character takes +1 level of Fatigue. This can be alleviated by covering the mouth with cloth, rebreathers, or any other gasmask or filtration system. If in an open area with working ventilation systems, the Spore Special Rule will not work and Characters will not gain fatigue.

When the Infection Form attacks a Character that is at 0 or lower Wounds, the Infection Form begins to take over that Character. In two Rounds, the Infection Form will have infected, taken over, and transformed the Character, creating either a Carrier Form or a Combat Form. If the Character burns a point of Luck, the Infection Form is destroyed and the Character is back to 1 Wound.

Flood Infection Forms attack in swarms of (X), where (X) is the Contamination Level, multiplied by 2. Swarms attack as one, increasing Mythic Strength by (X) for the Attack.

The GM may also substitute this number, if not using the Contamination Level, by taking the Bestiary Level and multiplying it by 10, or just choosing a number they feel fit against their Party.

On average, up to 10 Infection Forms can stay within a single 1x1 Meter tile.

Flood Infection Forms have the capability of exploding themselves. This allows the Flood Infection Form to kill itself, popping Spores into the area and dealing (X)D10 Damage with a Pierce of 10, where (X) is how many Pod Infection Forms were in the Swarm.

Burst is automatically triggered with Flood Infection Forms come in contact with Energy Shields and Plasma.

If the Flood Infection Form is unable to take over a Character for whatever reason, the Infect Form will begin to slowly melt itself and the Character into usable biomass. Once this happens to 5 Characters, a Pure Form of the GM’s choice is created.

The Carrier Forms gestate new Infection Forms, slowly becoming larger. At the point of formation, within the first Full Action of existence, the Carrier Form already holds one Infection Form.

Every 5 Rounds, one more Infection Form is created. Once 10 have Formed within the Carrier, the Carrier will burst. The Carrier Form may decide to wait to Burst until a victim is within distance.

At the point of Death or after forming 10 Infection Forms, the Carrier will explode. On detonation, the Carrier Form releases any Infection Form that was inside, while also dealing 3D10+10 Damage with a Pierce of 10. The Infection Forms are immune to the Burst.

The Burst covers a Radius of 2 Meters.
If killed using an explosive that has a Damage Roll of 3D10 or more, or by a Flamethrower weapon, the Infection Forms inside will be destroyed, as well.

The Carrier Form gestates a growing mass of Flood Spores, slowly becoming larger. Starting at 1, every 5 Turns the Carrier Form will gain +1 to Spore (X). Spore (X) is how large of a Radius in Meters the Carrier’s Burst will affect.

Once the Carrier Spore Form has reached Spore (10), was killed, or has gotten close enough to a victim, it will Burst.

At the point of Death or forming Spore (10), the Carrier will explode. On Detonation, the Carrier Form releases its Spores in an Blast radius equal to Spore (X). Anyone within 2 Meters will take 3D10+10 Damage with a Pierce of 10. Infection Forms are immune to the Burst. The Spore Cloud created will last Spore (X) in Turns.

At the point of Death or forming Spore (10), the Carrier will explode. On Detonation, the Carrier Form releases its Spores in an Blast radius equal to Spore (X). Anyone within 2 Meters will take 3D10+10 Damage with a Pierce of 10. Infection Forms are immune to the Burst. The Spore Cloud created will last Spore (X) in Turns.

Flood Combat Forms have two arms, which have the possibility of mutation. The GM may choose two arm weapon types, or use the default selection of one Whip Arm and one Weapon Arm. Weapon Arms are the only one where the Combat Form is able to use weapons that take a hand to hold.

Flood Combat Forms have a Damage Resistance equal to their Toughness modifier + mythic toughness + half of the armor they were weaing before they were turned. Flood Combat forms always count as wearing armor because of this and any additional armor must be able to stack with their normal armor.

The Hivemind Ability allows the Juggernaut to improve the capabilities of Flood Pure Forms and Combat Forms around them. Flood Forms within a 100 Meter radius of the Juggernaut are given a 10 Intellect and are able to work together more easily. The GM may allow Combat Form hordes to work more tactically, such as having them target a single Character, for example. Combat Forms are able to see and experience what the Juggernaut Form is experiencing.

The Abomination is able to use a Half Action to go in and out of a Roll, where they move very fast. While rolling The Abomination doubles it’s charge and run movement speed. The Abomination may make a jump attack out from this Roll and gain -10 To Hit, but +1D10 Damage.
The Character will detonate when killed, and when within 1 Meter of a Character. This deals 2D10 Damage, with 10 Pierce. This kills the Character.
The Pure Stalker Form is able to mutate into the Pure Tank Form and the Pure Ranger Form. This Action takes 2 Half Actions to perform. The Form keeps the same Wounds, but Characteristics will change.

The Bomber spits an explosive ball of biomass that detonates on impact. The Bomber can spit out these Bile Attacks at terrifying distances of up to 50 Meters away. The Bomber can spit two types of Bile Bombs: Scatter Bile and Blast Bile.  Scatter Bile will fire off 4 small balls of Bile that will each Scatter 1D10 Meters from the desired location to strike. This is increased by 1D10 for every degree of Failure, to a maximum of 50 Meters away from the Bomber. Each Scatter Bile Attack deals 1D10+9 Damage with a Pierce of 35 and Acid (3) Special Rule and Blast (3). Blast Bile will fire off 1 large ball of Bile that only Scatters 1D5 Meters from the desired location to strike. This is increased by 1D10 for every Degree of Failure, to a maximum of 50 Meters away from the Bomber. The Blast Bile deals 3D10+10 Damage with a Pierce of 30 and Acid (5) Special Rule and Blast (6). Bile Bombs are a Full Action Attack.

The Thrasher rushes forward with either a Run or a Charge Action to trample over anything in its path. Characters struck by the Trample must make a -40 Opposed Strength Test. If Failed, they’re left Prone on the ground after being thrown 1D5 Meters away from the Thrasher. However, if the Character being struck has 4 or more Mythic Strength, they do not gain the -40 Penalty. If Successful, the Character is not left Prone and is not sent flying. If the Character is sent into a wall from going flying, they take an extra +1D10 Damage from the Trample Attack. Characters who are already Prone when struck by Trample cannot get the Strength Test and automatically take the +1D10 Damage. Trample will deal 4D10 Damage + Strength Modifier to all Characters struck and can hit multiple Characters.
